_note: SEEDED OFAC SDN SUBSET — offline demo cache containing ONLY the sanctioned entities present in data/suppliers.json. This is NOT the full ~50MB treasury.gov SDN list. tools/sanctions_check.py matches a bid's supplier string against 'name' + 'aliases' (normalised: lowercased, punctuation-stripped, token match) so 'NIOC (Iran)' matches alias 'NIOC'. Live OFAC SDN/Consolidated XML refresh is a deferred scheduled job (never on the request path) — see the priority TODO in CLAUDE.md.
